close_reason: Implemented HTML-to-text fallback in fetchMarkdown(): content-type detection, DOMParser-based HTML conversion (strips script/style/nav/footer/header/noscript, prefers article>main>body), surfaces contentType and markdownTokens metadata. Added fetch.test.html and updated spec to @implemented.
description: When fetchMarkdown() receives an HTML response (Content-Type: text/html) instead of markdown, use the browser's DOMParser to strip tags and extract readable text. This is a client-side-only improvement — no server/proxy dependency. Includes: (1) check Content-Type on response, (2) parse HTML with DOMParser, (3) strip non-content elements (script, style, nav, footer, header), (4) prefer article/main content, (5) surface Content-Type and x-markdown-tokens metadata in return object. See research/2026-03-07-cloudflare-markdown-for-agents.md §Potential Improvements and research/2026-03-07-worker-proxy-rule-of-5-review.md §SCOPE-002.
title: HTML-to-text fallback for URL fetching
